description: Data labeling benchmark dataset with ground truth for Nautilus MVP

tasks.description: Classify news headlines into: technology, sports, politics, entertainment, business, science

items.text: OpenAI announces GPT-5 with improved reasoning capabilities
Federal Reserve raises interest rates by 0.25%
NASA discovers water on Mars surface
Barcelona wins Champions League final 3-1
Senate approves new immigration reform bill
Netflix releases most-watched series of the year
Tesla stock surges 15% after Q4 earnings beat
CRISPR gene therapy shows promise in clinical trials
World Cup qualifiers draw record TV audience in Asia
Apple launches Vision Pro 2 with spatial computing
This laptop is amazing! Best purchase I've ever made. Battery lasts all day.
Terrible customer service. Waited 3 hours on hold and still no resolution.
The product arrived on time. It works as described.
Absolutely love the new design! The camera quality is outstanding.
Broke after two weeks. Complete waste of money. Avoid at all costs.
It's okay. Nothing special but gets the job done.
The software update ruined everything. My phone is now extremely slow.
Five stars! Exceeded all my expectations. Would recommend to everyone.
Average quality for the price. You get what you pay for.
Incredible sound quality and noise cancellation. Worth every penny!

tasks.description: Extract named entities (PERSON, ORG, LOC, DATE) from text

items.text: Elon Musk announced that Tesla will open a new factory in Berlin by March 2026.
Google CEO Sundar Pichai met with EU officials in Brussels last Tuesday.
Microsoft acquired Activision Blizzard for $69 billion in January 2024.
The Tokyo Olympics were held in Japan during summer 2021.
Jeff Bezos stepped down as Amazon CEO and moved to Miami in 2023.

tasks.description: Classify customer support messages by intent

items.text: I was charged twice for my subscription this month
My app keeps crashing when I try to upload photos
How do I change my email address on my account?
What features are included in the premium plan?
This is unacceptable! I've been waiting for my refund for 3 weeks!
I want to cancel my subscription effective immediately
Can you explain why my bill went up from $9.99 to $14.99?
The video player won't load on my Samsung TV
I need to update my payment method to a new credit card
Do you offer a family plan with multiple profiles?

tasks.description: Classify autonomous driving scenarios: weather, time_of_day, road_type, traffic_density

items.text: Sensor data shows wet road surface, reduced visibility to 200m, windshield wipers active
Multi-lane divided highway, speed limit 120km/h, minimal vehicles ahead
Dense fog detected, visibility below 50m, temperature near dew point
Narrow residential street, parked cars on both sides, pedestrians crossing
Headlights on, streetlights illuminating road, moon visible, 23:00 timestamp
Stop-and-go traffic, average speed 15km/h, vehicles within 5m in all directions
Bright sunshine, clear sky, temperature 25C, excellent visibility >10km
Two-lane country road, open fields on both sides, no other vehicles detected
Scattered vehicles, average spacing 100m, free-flowing movement at speed limit
Rain intensity increasing, aquaplaning risk detected, road spray from trucks
